questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt:
Consider the following statements regarding the Regional Integrated Multi-Hazard Early Warning System (RIMES):
1. It is an intergovernmental body that evolved in response to the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami.
2. Its regional early warning operations are headquartered in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
3. It provides disaster risk reduction strategies and capacity building to its Member States.

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: Statement 1 is correct: RIMES is an intergovernmental body that evolved post the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami. Statement 2 is incorrect: It operates from its regional early warning centre at the Asian Institute of Technology in Thailand. Colombo, Sri Lanka, was the host city for its 4th Ministerial Conference, not its headquarters. Statement 3 is correct: RIMES provides early warning services, disaster risk reduction strategies, and capacity building to Member States.
questions.takeaway: RIMES is an intergovernmental organization born out of the 2004 tsunami tragedy, operating from Thailand to provide multi-hazard early warning and capacity building.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Intergovernmental body that provides early warning services, disaster risk reduction strategies, and capacity building to Member States. Evolved post 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami... Operates from its regional early warning centre at Asian Institute of Technology in Thailand.

questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: The 'Declaration on Disaster Preparedness', recently seen in the news, was adopted during the Ministerial Conference of which of the following organizations?

options.text: South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC)
Regional Integrated Multi-Hazard Early Warning System (RIMES)
United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR)

questions.explanation: The Declaration on Disaster Preparedness was adopted at the 4th Ministerial Conference of the Regional Integrated Multi-Hazard Early Warning System (RIMES), which was held in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
questions.takeaway: The 4th Ministerial Conference of RIMES, held in Colombo, concluded with the adoption of the Declaration on Disaster Preparedness.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Declaration on Disaster Preparedness adopted at 4th Ministerial Conference of RIMES, held in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
